title: Goti found 4 promising products
body: From Facebook Marketplace, Nextdoor, OfferUp, and Craigslist.

title: Lowest price or fastest pickup?
body: Goti can prioritize Maya's FlexiSpot ($195 likely) for price proof, or Ari's Vari Electric for same-day pickup.

title: Pursue FlexiSpot first
body: A reply at $195 becomes leverage for the better Uplift desk.
